title: stachys spreitzenhoferi
intro: Stachys spreitzenhoferi, also known as the alpine betony or mountain betony, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of essential oils and saponins. The health benefits of Stachys spreitzenhoferi include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
